differential_diagnoses: Neurodegenerative dementia with incidental findings (e.g., AD)
next_steps: Send serum and CSF for a comprehensive paraneoplastic and autoimmune encephalitis antibody panel
Initiate high-dose intravenous corticosteroid therapy (e.g., methylprednisolone) pending antibody results for suspected autoimmune/inflammatory process
Perform whole-body PET-CT to evaluate for occult primary malignancy
Initiate antiseizure therapy (Lacosamide or Levetiracetam) due to EEG findings of periodic discharges
Schedule brain biopsy if clinical status fails to improve after immunotherapy trial or if antibody panels are negative
Monitor CSF for serial inflammatory markers and cytology
